queries.question: Which company has hired a data analyst?
queries.sql:
SELECT r.name
FROM Position p
JOIN Company r ON p.companyId = r.id
WHERE p.title = 'Data Analyst'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?r a :Companies .
  ?p p:hasCompany ?r .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?p p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Data Analyst")
}

queries.question: What company hired the data analyst and which recruitment agency was used?
queries.sql:
SELECT r.name, ag.agencyName
FROM Position p
JOIN Company r ON p.companyId = r.id
JOIN Recruitment_Agency ag ON p.RecruitmentAgencyId = ag.id WHERE p.title = 'Data Analyst'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?agencyname WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?r a :Companies .
  ?p p:hasCompany ?r .
  ?ag a :Recruitment_Agency .
  ?p p:hasRecruitment_Agency ?ag .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?ag p:agencyName ?agencyname .
  ?p p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Data Analyst")
}

queries.question: Who hires a data analyst?
queries.sql:

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>

queries.question: Which tech companies and recruitment agencies have already conducted the interviews?
queries.sql:
SELECT r.name, ag.agencyName
FROM Position p
JOIN Company r ON p.companyId = r.id
LEFT JOIN Applicant a ON p.id = a.positionId
LEFT JOIN Interview i ON a.id = i.applicantId
JOIN Recruitment_Agency ag ON p.RecruitmentAgencyId = ag.id WHERE status = 'Completed'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?agencyname WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?r a :Companies .
  ?p p:hasCompany ?r .
  ?a a :Applicants .
  ?a p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?i a :Interview .
  ?i p:hasApplicant ?a .
  ?ag a :Recruitment_Agency .
  ?p p:hasRecruitment_Agency ?ag .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?ag p:agencyName ?agencyname .
  ?i p:status ?status_f .
  FILTER(STR(?status_f) = "Completed")
}

queries.question: Which recruitment agencies have already conducted the interviews?
queries.sql:
SELECT r.agencyName
FROM Position p
JOIN Recruitment_Agency r ON p.RecruitmentAgencyId = r.id
LEFT JOIN Applicant a ON p.id = a.positionId
LEFT JOIN Interview i ON a.id = i.applicantId
WHERE status = 'Completed'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?agencyname WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?r a :Recruitment_Agency .
  ?p p:hasRecruitment_Agency ?r .
  ?a a :Applicants .
  ?a p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?i a :Interview .
  ?i p:hasApplicant ?a .
  ?r p:agencyName ?agencyname .
  ?i p:status ?status_f .
  FILTER(STR(?status_f) = "Completed")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Who hires a data analyst?
Who has already conducted the interview?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  full: { SELECT ?name ?agencyname WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?r a :Companies .
  ?p p:hasCompany ?r .
  ?a a :Applicants .
  ?a p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?i a :Interview .
  ?i p:hasApplicant ?a .
  ?ag a :Recruitment_Agency .
  ?p p:hasRecruitment_Agency ?ag .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?ag p:agencyName ?agencyname .
  ?i p:status ?status_f .
  FILTER(STR(?status_f) = "Completed")
} }
  component: { SELECT ?agencyname WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?r a :Recruitment_Agency .
  ?p p:hasRecruitment_Agency ?r .
  ?a a :Applicants .
  ?a p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?i a :Interview .
  ?i p:hasApplicant ?a .
  ?r p:agencyName ?agencyname .
  ?i p:status ?status_f .
  FILTER(STR(?status_f) = "Completed")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?r a :Companies .
  ?p p:hasCompany ?r .
  ?a a :Applicants .
  ?a p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?i a :Interview .
  ?i p:hasApplicant ?a .
  ?r p:name ?name .
  ?i p:status ?status_f .
  FILTER(STR(?status_f) = "Completed")
} }
}
